subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who is the Best-Beloved! Worthy and befitting is He Who, through His blessed Word "There is none other God but God," distinguished between truth and polytheism [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حضرت مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که بکلمه مبارکه لا اله الا الله مابین مشرکین
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @unity; oneness of humanity, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @knowledge; recognition of God
